name: Fiserv, Inc.
description: Fiserv, Inc. is a leading global provider of payments and financial services technology. The company serves clients worldwide, including banks, thrifts, credit unions, securities broker-dealers, mortgage advisers, and merchants. Fiserv assists its clients in managing their operations through services such as electronic bill payment, account-to-account transfers, person-to-person payments, card developer services, and business analytics. Through its Clover point-of-sale platform and Carat enterprise merchant solution, Fiserv enables businesses of all sizes to accept payments and run their operations efficiently.
